steps.title: Identify what data to find
steps.content: The question asks for the total area of the Colville Tribes in Washington. This value appears in the table.

steps.title: Read the table and match the value
steps.content: Choice A provides 2,185 square miles, which is the exact area the table shows for the Colville Tribes in Washington. Choices B, C, and D are incorrect: B lacks a number, and C and D provide wrong values. That matches choice A — A is correct.
